title: Best VPN for Spain 2026: Movistar+, Privacy and Streaming
description: The best VPNs for Spain in 2026. Whether you need Movistar+ access abroad, secure connections in Spain, or privacy from ISP tracking, these are your top options.
content:
SPAIN HAS A STRONG STREAMING MARKET with Movistar+, RTVE Play, Atresplayer, and Mitele all geo-blocked outside Spanish territory. For Spanish expats living abroad or travelers who want to maintain access to Spanish content, a VPN with reliable Spanish servers is essential. For users in Spain, a VPN protects against ISP tracking and secures connections on public Wi-Fi in Barcelona, Madrid, and coastal resort areas where tourist-targeting networks are common.

Best VPNs for Spain in 2026

NordVPN - Best Overall for Spain

NordVPN operates servers in Madrid and Barcelona. Both server locations work with Movistar+, RTVE Play, and Atresplayer. NordVPN uses AES-256 encryption with WireGuard-based NordLynx protocol for fast connection speeds. The no-logs policy has been independently audited by Deloitte. Pricing runs around 3.99 EUR/month on a two-year plan.

For Spanish users concerned about privacy, NordVPN is registered in Panama (outside EU data-retention requirements), which means Spanish authorities cannot compel NordVPN to hand over user data. This matters in the context of Spain's complex relationship with online content regulation during the Catalan crisis period.

ExpressVPN - Best for Speed and Travel

ExpressVPN has servers in Madrid and delivers the fastest connection speeds of any major VPN in 2026 via its Lightway protocol. For streaming 4K content from Movistar+ or gaming without lag, ExpressVPN is the top performer. It costs more (around 6.67 EUR/month on a 12-month plan) but the speed premium is worth it for heavy users.

Surfshark - Best Budget VPN for Spain

Surfshark offers Spanish servers at around 2.49 EUR/month on a 24-month plan with unlimited simultaneous connections. For households with multiple devices or families sharing an account, this makes Surfshark the most cost-effective option that still delivers reliable streaming access to Spanish content.

Spanish Streaming Services You Can Access with a VPN

  • Movistar+: Spain's premium cable/streaming service. Requires Spanish IP. Works with NordVPN and ExpressVPN Madrid servers.
  • RTVE Play: Spain's public broadcaster, free streaming. Geo-blocked outside Spain. Works with any Spanish server VPN.
  • Atresplayer: Atresmedia's streaming platform (Antena 3, La Sexta). Geo-blocked outside Spain.
  • Mitele: Mediaset's free streaming service (Telecinco, Cuatro). Geo-blocked outside Spain.

Why Use a VPN While in Spain

Spain has thousands of public Wi-Fi networks, from Barcelona's airport and the Madrid Metro to beach resort hotel networks. These networks are unencrypted and subject to packet-sniffing attacks. A VPN protects all traffic on these networks. Spanish ISPs (Movistar, Vodafone ES, Orange ES) also collect and store user browsing data as required by EU data retention directives. A VPN prevents ISPs from logging your browsing activity.

Spain also blocks access to certain streaming sites via ISP-level DNS blocking. A VPN bypasses this by routing your DNS requests through the VPN server rather than your ISP's DNS. This restores access to geo-blocked international content and any DNS-blocked sites.

VPN for Accessing Spain from Abroad

If you are a Spanish expat in Germany, the UK, or elsewhere, a VPN with Spanish servers is essential for maintaining your streaming subscriptions and accessing Spanish banking apps that sometimes require a domestic IP for security reasons. Set your VPN to a Madrid server before opening banking apps that trigger "unusual location" warnings when you log in from abroad.
